manifest.name: Birthday Reminder

name: Birthday Reminder

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🐛 Birthday Reminder v1.5.2 Released

#### 🛠️ Bug Fixes

**Age Calculation Logic Fix**

- **Before:** Age calculation had edge-case errors when determining whether a birthday has passed for the current year
    
- **After:** Properly separated year calculation logic for accurate age display
    

**What was fixed:**

- Birthday date calculation now explicitly separates:
    
    - Calculate this year's birthday date
        
    - Determine if this year's birthday has already passed (this year's birthday < today)
        
    - If passed, use next year's birthday date
        
- Added `nextBirthdayYear` variable to avoid redundant calculations and ensure consistency
    
- Age now correctly calculated using `nextBirthdayYear` instead of `nextBirthday.getFullYear()` — preventing the off-by-one-year age error when birthdays have already passed
    

**Code clarity improvements:**

- Explicitly extracted `birthMonth` and `birthDay` variables
    
- Condition logic made more intuitive: `if (nextBirthday < today)`
    

#### 📦 Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version: **v1.12.7**


---


### 🐛 生日提醒插件 v1.5.2 发布

#### 🛠️ Bug 修复

**年龄计算逻辑修复**

- **修复前：** 判断当年生日是否已过时，年龄计算存在边界情况错误
    
- **修复后：** 正确分离年份计算逻辑，确保年龄显示准确
    

**具体修复内容：**

- 生日日期计算现在明确分离以下步骤：
    
    - 计算今年的生日日期
        
    - 判断今年生日是否已过（今年生日 < 今天）
        
    - 如果已过，则使用明年的生日日期
        
- 新增 `nextBirthdayYear` 变量，避免重复计算并确保一致性
    
- 年龄现在使用 `nextBirthdayYear` 而非 `nextBirthday.getFullYear()` 正确计算 —— 解决了生日已过时年龄多算 1 岁的问题
    

**代码清晰度提升：**

- 明确提取 `birthMonth` 和 `birthDay` 变量
    
- 条件判断更直观：`if (nextBirthday < today)`
    

#### 📦 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本：**v1.12.7**
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.5.2

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🔧 Birthday Reminder v1.5.1 Released
#### 🛠️ Fixes & Improvements

**Installation Fix**

- Lowered `minAppVersion` from `1.13.0` to `1.12.7` to match the latest stable Obsidian build
    
- Resolves the "no appropriate version found" error when installing from the community plugin store
    

**Complete Localization**

- All settings UI text now fully localized via the `locale` object
    
- Color scheme names localized: Default / Warm Orange / Cool Blue / Nature Green / Elegant Purple (English) and 默认 / 温暖橙 / 清新蓝 / 自然绿 / 优雅紫 (Chinese)
    
- Example text in birthday property field switches between "Example:" and "示例：" based on language
    
- Language dropdown always shows "中文" and "English" for clarity
    

**UI Polish**

- Slider now shows dynamic tooltip (e.g., "3 months") when dragging — better user feedback
    
- Color preview updates in real-time when switching color schemes
    
- Color scheme control and preview reordered for better visual logic
    

**Language Switching**

- Switching languages now refreshes the settings panel immediately via `this.display()`
    


#### 📦 Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version: **v1.12.7**
    
- Fully compatible with the latest Obsidian stable release
    


---


### 🔧 生日提醒插件 v1.5.1 发布

#### 🛠️ 修复与优化

**安装问题修复**

- 将 `minAppVersion` 从 `1.13.0` 降低至 `1.12.7`，匹配 Obsidian 最新稳定版
    
- 解决了社区插件市场安装时提示 "no appropriate version found" 的错误
    

**完整本地化**

- 所有设置界面文本现已通过 `locale` 对象完全本地化
    
- 配色方案名称本地化：英文版显示 Default / Warm Orange / Cool Blue / Nature Green / Elegant Purple；中文版显示 默认 / 温暖橙 / 清新蓝 / 自然绿 / 优雅紫
    
- 生日属性字段的示例文本根据语言切换显示 "Example:" 或 "示例："
    
- 语言下拉选项始终显示 "中文" 和 "English"，清晰明了
    

**UI 交互优化**

- 滑块现在显示动态提示（如拖动时显示"3 个月"）—— 更好的用户反馈
    
- 切换配色方案时颜色预览实时更新
    
- 配色方案控件与预览重新排列，视觉逻辑更合理
    

**语言切换即时生效**

- 切换语言后设置界面立即刷新为新语言
    

#### 📦 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本：**v1.12.7**
    
- 完全兼容 Obsidian 最新稳定版
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.5.1

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🎯 Birthday Reminder v1.5.0 Released

#### 🛠️ Major Changes

**Settings API — Stability First**
- Reverted from the new declarative `getSettingDefinitions()` API to the **traditional `Setting` class + `display()` method** for better stability and maturity
- Retained `getSettingDefinitions()` returning an empty array as a **future upgrade path**
- All settings are now fully functional with proper type annotations

**Complete Settings Implementation**
- Target folder path (text input)
- Birthday property name (text input with example)
- Visible months range (slider: 1–6 months)
- Color scheme selection (dropdown with preview)
- Language selection (Chinese/English)
- Feature toggles: Lunar calendar, Zodiac, Calendar view, Statistics, Highlight today

**Polish & Improvements**
- Color preview uses simple English strings to avoid localization issues
- Example text integrated into `desc` field for cleaner `name` display
- All `name` fields now concise and meaningful
- Proper `get/setControlValue` implementation ensures correct value reading/writing


#### 📦 Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version: **v1.13.0**


---


### 🎯 生日提醒插件 v1.5.0 发布
#### 🛠️ 主要变更

**设置 API —— 稳定性优先**
- 从新式声明式 `getSettingDefinitions()` API **回归传统 `Setting` 类 + `display()` 方法**，以获得更好的稳定性和成熟度
- 保留 `getSettingDefinitions()` 返回空数组，作为**未来升级的预留接口**
- 所有设置项现已完整实现，并带有正确的类型注解

**完整的设置项实现**
- 目标文件夹路径（文本框）
- 生日属性名（文本框，附示例）
- 可见月份范围（滑块：1–6 个月）
- 配色方案选择（下拉菜单 + 预览）
- 语言选择（中文/英文）
- 功能开关：农历、星座、日历视图、统计、高亮今天

**完善与优化**
- 颜色预览使用简单的英文字符串，避免本地化问题
- 示例文本整合到 `desc` 字段中，`name` 更简洁清晰
- 所有 `name` 字段精简且含义明确
- 正确实现 `get/setControlValue`，确保值读写无误


#### 📦 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本：**v1.13.0**
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.5.0

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🔧 Birthday Reminder v1.3.1 Released

#### 🛠️ Fixes & Improvements

- **Promise handling** – Added `await` for `revealLeaf` in main.ts; `updateLayoutMode()` now properly `async` with `void` at all call sites; added `.catch()` error handling for `.then()` chains in settings
    
- **Async operations** – Properly handled async operations inside `ResizeObserver` and `setInterval` callbacks
    
- **Type safety** – Added type assertions for `loadData()` results and dropdown options; removed unnecessary type assertions where inferred correctly
    
- **Error resilience** – Better error handling throughout the plugin
    
#### 📦 Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version remains **v1.4.0**
 

### 🔧 生日提醒插件 v1.3.1 发布

#### 🛠️ 修复与优化

- **Promise 处理完善** – main.ts 中为 `revealLeaf` 添加 `await`；`updateLayoutMode()` 改为 `async` 函数，所有调用处添加 `void` 标记；settings.ts 中为 `.then()` 链添加 `.catch()` 错误处理
    
- **异步操作规范化** – 正确处理 `ResizeObserver` 和 `setInterval` 回调中的异步操作
    
- **类型安全强化** – 为 `loadData()` 结果和下拉选项添加类型断言；移除不必要的类型断言（类型可自动推断处）
    
- **错误处理增强** – 插件各模块错误处理更加健壮
    

#### 📦 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本保持 **v1.4.0**
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.4.1

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🚀 Birthday Reminder v1.4.0 Released

#### ✨ Major Changes

- **Settings API Migration** – Migrated from the deprecated `display()` method to the new `getSettingDefinitions()` API (requires Obsidian v1.13.0+)
    
- **Type Safety Overhaul** – Replaced all `any` type assertions with proper type guards and `Record<string, unknown>`; added explicit type annotations for all callback parameters
    
- **Documentation Fix** – Updated GitHub repository links in README from placeholder `yourname/...` to the correct `ichris007/Obsidian-Birthday-Reminder`
    
#### 🛠️ Fixes & Improvements

- **main.ts** – Fixed type safety issue in `loadSettings()` using nullish coalescing operator (`?? {}`)
    
- **view.ts** – Replaced unsafe `any` assertions with proper type guards for frontmatter; fixed all `openLinkText` calls by changing second parameter from `''` to `null` (5 locations)
    
- **settings.ts** – Fully migrated to declarative settings definitions using `SettingDef` type; implemented type-safe `COLOR_SCHEMES` with `as const` and `keyof typeof`
    
- **manifest.json** – Raised `minAppVersion` from `1.4.0` to `1.13.0`
    
#### 📦 Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version: **v1.13.0**
    

---

### 🚀 生日提醒插件 v1.4.0 发布

#### ✨ 主要变更

- **设置 API 迁移** – 从已弃用的 `display()` 方法迁移至新的 `getSettingDefinitions()` API（需要 Obsidian v1.13.0+）
    
- **类型安全重构** – 将所有 `any` 类型断言替换为正确的类型守卫和 `Record<string, unknown>`；为所有回调参数添加明确的类型注解
    
- **文档修复** – 将 README 中的 GitHub 仓库链接从占位符 `yourname/...` 更新为正确的 `ichris007/Obsidian-Birthday-Reminder`
    
#### 🛠️ 修复与优化

- **main.ts** – 使用空值合并运算符（`?? {}`）修复 `loadSettings()` 的类型安全问题
    
- **view.ts** – 使用正确的类型守卫替换不安全的 `any` 断言；修复所有 `openLinkText` 调用，将第二个参数从 `''` 改为 `null`（共 5 处）
    
- **settings.ts** – 完全迁移至声明式设置定义（使用 `SettingDef` 类型）；使用 `as const` 和 `keyof typeof` 实现类型安全的 `COLOR_SCHEMES`
    
- **manifest.json** – 最低 Obsidian 版本从 `1.4.0` 提升至 `1.13.0`
    
#### 📦 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本：**v1.13.0**
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.4.0

releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.3.1

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🎉 Birthday Reminder v1.3.0 Released

#### ✨ New Features

- **Auto-refresh** – The view now automatically updates when birthday notes are created, deleted, renamed, or modified (with 100ms debounce for smooth performance)


#### 🛠️ Improvements

- **Promise handling** – All async operations in callbacks now properly marked with `void`; `setTimeout` and `clearInterval` now use `window` prefix for better popout window compatibility
- **Type safety** – Added type assertions for `loadData()` results and dropdown options; all `openLinkText` calls now properly handled
- **Code cleanup** – Removed unused variables (`scheme`, `birthdaySpan`, `nextSpan`, `ageSpan`, `prevMonthYear`, `nextMonthYear`)



#### 📦 Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version updated to **v1.4.0** (required for file system events API)
- Removed `builtin-modules` dependency, switched to Node.js built-in `module.builtinModules`


---


### 🎉 生日提醒插件 v1.3.0 发布

#### ✨ 新功能

- **自动刷新** – 当生日笔记被创建、删除、重命名或修改时，视图会自动更新（内置 100ms 防抖，保证性能流畅）



#### 🛠️ 优化内容

- **Promise 处理规范化** – 所有回调中的异步操作均添加 `void` 标记；`setTimeout` 和 `clearInterval` 统一使用 `window` 前缀，提升弹出窗口兼容性
- **类型安全增强** – 为 `loadData()` 结果和下拉选项添加类型断言；所有 `openLinkText` 调用正确标记
- **代码清理** – 移除未使用的变量（`scheme`、`birthdaySpan`、`nextSpan`、`ageSpan`、`prevMonthYear`、`nextMonthYear`）



#### 📦 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本要求升级至 **v1.4.0**（文件系统事件 API 所需）
- 移除 `builtin-modules` 依赖，改用 Node.js 内置 `module.builtinModules`
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.3.0

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
### 🎉 Birthday Reminder v1.2.0 Released

This release focuses on **code quality, performance, and maintainability**, with all community plugin review issues resolved.

#### ✨ Improvements
- **Memory leak fixes** – Removed leftover `this.view` reference and improved interval cleanup
- **Type safety enhancements** – Added frontmatter type guards, null checks, and better Promise handling
- **UI overhaul** – Replaced all inline styles with CSS classes (100+ changes), improving theme compatibility and maintainability
- **Settings panel polish** – Migrated from `innerHTML` to native Obsidian API (`createEl`/`setText`), removed deprecated `setDynamicTooltip`
- **Command ID updated** – `show-birthday-reminder` → `show` (cleaner and standard-compliant)

#### 🛠️ Dev & Build
- Updated `minAppVersion` to `1.1.0`
- Removed `builtin-modules` dependency, switched to Node.js built-in `module.builtinModules`
- Full TypeScript type check passed (`tsc --noEmit`)

#### ✅ Verification
- ✅ `npm run build` – success  
- ✅ No `innerHTML` usage  
- ✅ No direct `style` assignments  
- ✅ All Promises handled  
- ✅ No memory leaks

---

### 🎉 生日提醒插件 v1.2.0 发布

本次更新重点优化了**代码质量、性能与可维护性**，并修复了 Obsidian 社区插件审查中提出的所有问题。

#### ✨ 优化内容
- **内存泄漏修复** – 移除多余的 `this.view` 引用，优化定时器清理逻辑
- **类型安全增强** – 增加 frontmatter 类型守卫、空值检查，规范 Promise 处理
- **UI 重构** – 将全部内联样式迁移为 CSS 类（涉及 100+ 处改动），提升主题兼容性与可维护性
- **设置面板优化** – 弃用 `innerHTML`，改用原生 Obsidian API（`createEl`/`setText`），移除废弃的 `setDynamicTooltip`
- **命令 ID 规范化** – `show-birthday-reminder` → `show`，更简洁合规

#### 🛠️ 开发与构建
- 最低 Obsidian 版本要求升级至 `1.1.0`
- 移除 `builtin-modules` 依赖，改用 Node.js 内置 `module.builtinModules`
- 完整通过 TypeScript 类型检查（`tsc --noEmit`）

#### ✅ 验证结果
- ✅ `npm run build` – 编译成功  
- ✅ 无 `innerHTML` 使用  
- ✅ 无直接 `style` 属性赋值  
- ✅ 所有 Promise 正常处理  
- ✅ 无内存泄漏风险
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.2.0

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
v1.1.0 更新内容
✨ 新增功能
- 完整支持英文界面，生肖、星座、农历日期、年龄单位全部英文化
- 根据语言设置动态显示界面文本

🐛 Bug 修复
- 修复英文版本中生肖、星座仍显示中文的问题
- 修复年龄单位在英文环境下仍显示"岁"的问题

📝 其他
- 完善多语言本地化支持

---
v1.1.0 Release Notes
✨ New Features
- Full English interface support with localized animal signs, zodiac signs, lunar dates, and age units
- Dynamic interface text based on language settings

🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed issue where animal signs and zodiac signs displayed in Chinese even in English mode
- Fixed age unit showing "岁" (Chinese) instead of "years old" in English mode

📝 Other
- Improved multi-language localization support
releases.name: Birthday Reminder 1.1.0

releases.author: ichris007
releases.description:
v1.0.0 (2026-03-21)

- ✨ **首次发布**
- 🎯 **可配置生日属性**：支持自定义 frontmatter 属性名（`birthday`、`date_of_birth`、`DOB` 等）
- 🎯 智能生日计算和年龄计算
- 🌙 农历转换（使用 solarlunar 库）
- 🐉 生肖星座显示
- 📅 日历视图，支持月份导航
- 🎨 5套配色方案
- 🌐 中英文双语支持
- 📱 响应式布局，自动适配侧边栏/主窗口
- ⚙️ 丰富的可配置选项

---
- ✨ **Initial Release**
- 🎯 **Configurable Birthday Property**: Support custom frontmatter property names (`birthday`, `date_of_birth`, `DOB`, etc.)
- 🎯 Intelligent birthday calculation and age calculation
- 🌙 Lunar calendar conversion (using solarlunar library)
- 🐉 Zodiac and animal sign display
- 📅 Calendar view with month navigation
- 🎨 5 color schemes
- 🌐 Chinese/English bilingual support
- 📱 Responsive layout, automatically adapts to sidebar/main window
- ⚙️ Rich configuration options
releases.name: Birthday Reminder v1.0.0
